title: cynoglossum officinale var. hybridum
intro: Cynoglossum officinale var. hybridum, also known as Hound's Tongue, is a biennial or perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat coughs, colds, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Hound's Tongue include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, Hound's Tongue is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
